report.summary: Day 72 standup v20: BTC $70,600-$71,674 (stable). F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear) — 46-day streak. DELTA: Build-v16 shipped Tokenized Real Estate + Web3 Gaming/GameFi guides. On-Ramps & Portfolio Allocation promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue refilled with 2 new. 1,190 total page.tsx (+2). TS errors rose 142→154 (new: tokenized-real-estate). Git index.lock NOW 26+ hours — 121 pending files. ETF reversal: $312M inflows Mar 25. ~18 hrs to Thu convergence ($13.5B options + 91 SEC ETF rulings). 98 agent runs today ($7,959).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $70,600-$71,674 (stable from v19). 43% below ATH ($126,080). Holding above $70K for 3 consecutive days — renewed buying interest after war-driven selling. ETH ~$2,166-$2,327.
F&G INDEX: 8-11 (Extreme Fear). 46-day streak below 25 — longest since FTX collapse. Readings below 15 preceded 30-60 day recovery rallies in 7 of 9 instances since 2020.

SPOT ETF FLOWS (REVERSAL): $312M net inflows Mar 25 — BlackRock IBIT $187M + Fidelity FBTC $89M. Reverses Mar 24 outflows ($66.6M net). March total ~$1.2B. Institutional capital still rotating to tokenized treasuries ($12.8B March).

DELTA SINCE v19: Build-v16 shipped Tokenized Real Estate Guide 2026 (583 lines, 6 platform deep-dives: RealT/Lofty/Parcl/Propy/Landshare/Centrifuge) + Web3 Gaming & GameFi Guide 2026 (789 lines, 6 game breakdowns, Ronin/Immutable X chains). EOD-v19 confirmed On-Ramps + Portfolio Allocation promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue refilled with tokenized-real-estate + web3-gaming.

TOP CONTENT PERFORMANCE: Fear & Greed Timeline (+95%), Options Calculator (+93%), ETF Complete Guide (+92%), Congressional Tokenization (+90%), Tokenized RWA Guide (+88%). NEW: Real Estate + GameFi guides queued.
OPTIONS EXPIRY (~18 hrs): $13.5B on Deribit (BTC $10.2B + ETH $3.3B). Max pain estimates range $75K-$86K. Put/call ratio 0.85. Gamma hedging intensifies 12-18 hrs before settlement.

SEC 91 ETF RULING (~18 hrs): Final deadline Mar 27 for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens. 16 cryptos classified as commodities Mar 17. SEC catalyst has power to override options gravity entirely.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 🔴 BLOCKER PERSISTS [P0]: git index.lock since 09:58 UTC Mar 25 — now 26+ hours. 121 pending files (up from 106 in v19). Jefe: rm .git/index.lock → git add -A → commit → push → Vercel redeploy.

DONE SINCE v19: Build-v16 created Tokenized Real Estate + Web3 Gaming/GameFi guides (1,372 lines combined). EOD-v19 confirmed prior queue items (On-Ramps + Portfolio Allocation) promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue refilled with 2 new items.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items pending promotion (tokenized-real-estate-guide-2026, web3-gaming-gamefi-guide-2026) — both page.tsx verified.
PUBLISHED STATUS: 529 unique published slugs (+1 from v19). 1,190 total page.tsx files (+2 from build-v16). 257 learn guide dirs (+2).
TS ERRORS RISING: 154 across 6 files (up from 142/5 in v19). New contributor: tokenized-real-estate-guide-2026/page.tsx. lido-v3 still bulk (119).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter 0/6 core API routes. CoinGecko free tier, no API key.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. 103 legacy slugs without page.tsx.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 36 learn guides built, 30+ OG images, 166+ social posts drafted, 34+ SVG cards, 55+ UX fixes across 98 agent cycles.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR index.lock + MASS COMMIT + DEPLOY: 26+ hours blocked, 121 files stuck. Thu convergence is ~18 hours away. $13.5B options expiry + 91 SEC ETF rulings converging. 1,190 pages MUST be live. ETF flow reversal ($312M inflows today) shows institutional re-engagement — our content is perfectly timed. Every hour of delay is lost indexing time.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 2 QUEUE ITEMS + BUILD CONVERGENCE-READY CONTENT: Tokenized Real Estate + Web3 Gaming/GameFi verified and ready. Next build targets: (a) Options Expiry Recap template (pre-write for Thu), (b) SEC ETF Ruling Outcomes page (pre-write conditional angles), (c) Tax content refresh (19 days to April 15).

PRIORITY 3 — TS ERROR TRIAGE: 154 errors across 6 files (rising trend: 142→154). New contributor from tokenized-real-estate. Fix JSX escaping in lido-v3 (119 errors) to drop to ~35. Address before removing ignoreBuildErrors.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: ETF flow reversal ($312M inflows after $66.6M outflows) signals institutional bottom-fishing at extreme fear. BTC holding $70K for 3 days despite 46-day fear streak = strong support. Convergence window tightening to 18 hrs. degen0x has content covering ALL convergence angles — deploy remains sole bottleneck. Stablecoins $313B ATH = massive dry powder ready to deploy.
